  "sources": "Reads file existence status with grunt.file.exists, reads template content with grunt.file.read, processes template with grunt.template.process, and accesses configuration data via grunt.config().",
  "sinks": "Writes generated files to disk with grunt.file.write and logs progress with grunt.log.write and grunt.log.ok.",
  "flows": "Inputs such as file paths and templates flow through createunit to produce new files, without external or untrusted data influence affecting security-critical operations.",

It reads files, processes templates, and writes output files, all in a controlled and expected manner. There are no signs of malicious behavior such as network activity, data theft, or backdoors. The use of grunt's API appears standard and safe. No anomalies, obfuscation, or malicious code patterns are identified.",
